name: conviso-mcp
description: Expose Conviso Platform data (companies, projects, issues, assets, metrics) to MCP clients.
long_description: This MCP server provides tools to query companies, projects, issues, assets and risk metrics from the Conviso Platform.

tools.name: get_companies
tools.title: List Companies
tools.description: Return a paginated list of companies accessible with the provided API key. Use `search` to filter by company name.

tools.name: get_company_info
tools.title: Company Details
tools.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific company, including plan, integrations, and branding metadata.

tools.name: get_issues
tools.title: List Issues
tools.description: List vulnerabilities for a company or project. Supports pagination and filtering by project.

tools.name: get_issue
tools.title: Issue Details
tools.description: Fetch detailed technical data for a specific vulnerability/issue. Optionally include raw request/response and vulnerable code snippets.

tools.name: get_top_vulnerabilities
tools.title: Top Vulnerabilities
tools.description: Return a summary of vulnerability counts grouped by severity for a given company (risk overview).

tools.name: get_projects
tools.title: List Projects
tools.description: Return a paginated list of active security projects for a company. Defaults to 25 results per page to conserve tokens.

tools.name: get_project
tools.title: Project Details
tools.description: Retrieve detailed metadata for a specific project by its ID.

tools.name: get_assets
tools.title: List Assets
tools.description: Return a paginated list of assets for a company. Defaults to 25 results per page to reduce token usage.

tools.name: get_asset
tools.title: Asset Details
tools.description: Fetch information about a specific asset by its ID.

tools.name: create_issue_url
tools.title: Issue URL Generator
tools.description: Return a direct URL to open a specific issue in the Conviso Platform for triage or review.

tools.name: create_project_url
tools.title: Project URL Generator
tools.description: Return a direct URL to open a project in the Conviso Platform for quick navigation.

tools.name: get_mttr_over_time
tools.title: MTTR Over Time
tools.description: Get Mean Time To Resolution (MTTR) aggregated over a date range. Supports filtering by severities, statuses, and assets.

tools.name: get_overall_risk_score_history
tools.title: Risk Score History
tools.description: Retrieve historical overall risk scores for a company, useful for trend analysis and reporting.

tools.name: get_today_date
tools.title: Get Today Date
tools.description: Utility tool returning the current day, month and year.
